---
name: Skill request
about: Propose a new workflow-first engineering skill
title: "Skill request: "
labels: enhancement, skill-request
assignees: ""
---

## Proposed Workflow

What concrete engineering workflow should this skill cover?

## Problem It Solves

What recurring problem would this skill help an agent handle more reliably?

## Required Evidence

What evidence should the agent require before drawing conclusions? Include files, commands, logs, traces, tests, plans, queries, browser checks, or user-provided artifacts where relevant.

## Expected Artifact

What should the skill produce at the end of the workflow?

## Similar Existing Skills

Which existing skills are closest?

## Why This Is Not A Duplicate

Why cannot an existing skill cover this workflow with a handoff or small update?

## Proposed Domain

Which existing domain should this belong to?

## Additional Context

Add links, examples, or constraints that would help evaluate the request.
